creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
Created attachment 163227
shar file for www/sogo-activesync

As the title says, it's a slave port for the ACTIVESYNC option in www/sogo. 

Since there is no section in the porters handbook for slave ports. I have tried my best to guess what is required form some existing ports like www/apache22-event-mpm and www/php55-tidy.

NOTE: devel/sope and www/sogo (existing ports) should be committed at the same time as this. Please somebody create the blocks, I don't know how to yet.

devel/sope PR no.: 204617
www/sogo PR no.: 204618
